Declaration public BlazorIdentityManager(IOptions<BlazorIdentityOptions> options, ILogger<BlazorIdentityManager<TUser>> logger, SignInManager<TUser> signInManager, NavigationManager navigationManager, IEmailSender emailSender) Parameters Type Name Description IOptions < BlazorIdentityOptions > options The options to use with this manager. Fields _emailSender This field contains an email sender for this manager. Declaration protected readonly IEmailSender _emailSender Field Value Type Description IEmailSender _logger This field contains the logger for this manager. Declaration protected readonly NavigationManager _navigationManager Field Value Type Description NavigationManager _options This field contains the options for this manager. Declaration protected readonly SignInManager<TUser> _signInManager Field Value Type Description SignInManager <TUser> Properties SignInManager This property allows access to the inner sign-in manager. Declaration public SignInManager<TUser> SignInManager { get; } Property Value Type Description SignInManager <TUser> Methods PasswordSignInAsync(String, String, Boolean, Boolean, CancellationToken) This method attempts to sign in the given user, using the specified user name / email, and password. If the operation is successful, a redirect takes place to the associated middlewear module, to perform the actual login and (optionally) write the cookie. Declaration public virtual async ValueTask<SignInResult> PasswordSignInAsync(string emailOrUserName, string password, bool isPersistent, bool lockoutOnFailure, CancellationToken cancellationToken = null) Parameters Type Name Description System.String emailOrUserName The email address, or user name, to be used for the operation. System.String password The password to by used for the operation. System.Boolean isPersistent True to direct the middlewear module to write out the identity cookie; false otherwise. System.Boolean lockoutOnFailure True to direct the ASP.NET sign in manager to lockout the account on failure; false otherwise. CancellationToken cancellationToken A cancellation token. Returns Type Description ValueTask < SignInResult > A task to perform the operation, that returns a object. RegisterAsync(String, String, String, String, CancellationToken) This method attempts to register a new user, using the specified user name / email, and password. If the operation is successful, a redirect takes place to either the (A) confirmation page, or (B) the associated middlewear module. Declaration public virtual async ValueTask<RegisterResult> RegisterAsync(string userName, string email, string password, string confirmPassword, CancellationToken cancellationToken = null) Parameters Type Name Description System.String userName The user name to use for the operation. System.String email The email to use for the operation. System.String password The password to use for the operation. System.String confirmPassword The confirmation password to use for the operation. CancellationToken cancellationToken A cancellation token. Returns Type Description ValueTask < RegisterResult > A task to perform the operation, that returns a object. Extension Methods ObjectExtensions.CopyTo(Object, Object)
